title: Just A Server Pack (JASP)
description: Experience Minecraft Vanilla Servers, how they're meant to be experienced! Add on small tweaks, to make sure you get the best experience out of your Minecraft servers!
body:
## **Just A Server Pack (JASP)**

#### JASP is designed to be the best modpack for Semi-Vanilla multiplayer servers. Every mod helps with your experience, whether doubling your frame rate, letting you speak to nearby players, or just giving you the settings you need. This is the perfect pack for you.
---
## Features

### ⚡ Performance and Utility
| Mod | What it does for you |
|---|---|
| Sodium | Completely replaces Minecraft's rendering, to significantly increase FPS. |
| Lithium | Provides optimisation for game physics, like AI and block ticking. |
| Entity Culling | Stops the game from rendering entities that you cannot see through walls |
| More Culling | Extends the culling logic to blocks, and other elements. |

### 🖼️ Visuals
| Mod | What it does for you |
|---|---|
| **Entity Model Features** | Support for servers using custom entity model resource packs. |
| **Entity Texture Features** | Same idea, but for custom textures. |
| **Gamma Utils** | Toggle fullbright to see in dark areas. *Use only if your server allows it.* |
| **Sodium Extra** | Unlocks a ton of extra video settings you can edit, to help your performance. |
| **Reese's Sodium Options** | Redesigns the Sodium settings screen so you can actually find what you're looking for. |

---

### 🛠️ Quality of Life
| Mod | What it does for you |
|---|---|
| **Zoomify** | Allows you to zoom, with smooth transitions |
| **Armor Poser** | Allows you to edit armour stands into cool positions. *Requires server-side plugin.* |
| **Mod Menu** | Allows you to view and configure all of your installed mods |

---

### 👥 Multiplayer & Social
| Mod | What it does for you |
|---|---|
| **Simple Voice Chat** | Allows you to talk to players in-game, who are in near proximity. *Requires server-side plugin.* |
| **Chat Heads** | Allows you to see player heads in places like chat, to see who's talking |
| **Essential** | Allows you to have many features, like cosmetics, friends, and more! |

---

### 💻 For Server Owners
Most JASP mods are completely client side, and do not need any server side set up, except for two. Please install these server-side plugins for full compatability:
- **Simple Voice Chat** - enables proximity voice
- **Armor Poser** - enables armor stand posing
